item.title: Tomorrow is my 9th Anniversary at therapy
item.description: Its hard for me to believe tomorrow will be my 9th anniversary at therapy. Im really proud of my progress. Im getting closer to my goals. It has definitely been a tough year but im still working hard. I hope everyone has a wonderful day. Thank you for all the encouragement and support it really appreciate everything.
item.dc:creator: kaosnole95

item.title: Dump on how things are done. Some nice things I learned here. Enjoy !
item.description:
Choose between the "Don't stick your..." or "Paige no...." caption.
Patching up a spot in the wall.
Pattern on concrete floor.
Nicely done and clean. But attention, it's not always the best treatment for the tiles.
Bathtub mould.
Pool cleaning robot.
Applying silicone sealant in the bathroom.
Cap embroidery machine.
Cricket Sorter.
Induction pipe bender.
Leather strap hole punch.
The Springelator.
Perfectly cut metal pieces.
Ring remover.
Rolling ink onto a linocut printing block.
Full restoration of an old pan.
Shrink wrap over-underer.
Wheel squisher.
A Crate stacker !
Two trains docking together Setting up an underwater breathing mask.
600 kph Maglev train’s cockpit in China.
Two trains docking together.
130 meter long rails being transported. They seem to be very bend, but it's an illusion due to heavy zooming.
Hand-painting porcelain patterns so perfectly. Wow wow wow. Now I want one.
Jaffa Cakes falling off a conveyor belt for their chocolate coating.
Soap cutter.
Sand-fixing agent for patching damaged driveway. Easy as that.
The art of optical fiber splicing, which requires extreme precision.
Weaving steel wire mesh.
A Veggie washer !
Dozens of fishermen end up losing body parts to wolf fish. This is because many people don't realize that even after being "dead", and without a body, it is still capable of this ...
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: This dump truck is full of recyclables
item.dc:creator: CanadianLadyMoose

item.title: Kinda sucks ass
item.description: Just need to vent because I can't anywhere else. Worked long and hard on a project in my field, was a multiple year design. Submitted into a category for a nationally recognised award. The submission paper was heavily edited to recognise a "company effort", keywords changed to address a "team attitude". Hadn't heard back for some time so i followed up. Found the submission was shortlisted as a finalist and the boss has asked for a head of department to accept the award on behalf of the company. I was extended an invite to attend out of courtesy....I am just so frustrated and angry with this whole thing. All this work and I dont think i will be recognised in any capacity, doubtful even within my own company...anyway thanks reading...
item.dc:creator: Therepostingposterwithoutanytitleperson

item.title: GovBrief Today #472
item.description: Louisiana Gov. Jeff Landry landed in Greenland today for a conference he wasn't invited to. Trump named Landry his Greenland envoy after Denmark and Greenland both refused to entertain a U.S. takeover of the island. Not a single Greenlandic politician is scheduled to meet with him. Two other governments contradicted him on the record today. China called the Beijing summit deals "preliminary," walking back his claims on tariffs, agriculture, and the sale of 200 Boeing jets. Meanwhile, Taiwan bristled at Trump floating a previously agreed arms sale as leverage with Beijing. Trump announces wins even when there aren't any. After thousands of documented lies in office, Americans now have to wait for the other country to confirm what he says. Use 5 Calls or Resistbot to demand Congress investigate what these governments actually agreed to, before the White House announces another one. I've emailed 7,445 stories over 472 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss today's quote of the day, images, and data on the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260517-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/china-preliminary [2] https://go.govbrief.today/taiwan-arms [3] https://go.govbrief.today/landry-nuuk [4] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may17 [5] https://go.govbrief.today/ebola-who [6] https://go.govbrief.today/navy-air [7] https://go.govbrief.today/kean-father [8] https://go.govbrief.today/rededication [9] https://go.govbrief.today/wh-helipad Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Rep. Gabe Evans (R-CO) voted to slash over $1 trillion from Medicaid and the ACA.We asked Rep. Evans if he is concerned about the people in his district who will lose healthcare, and may die, because of his vote. He laughed. Then he ran away.
item.dc:creator: MakeUSGreatAgain

item.title: It's all the same recycled dehumanizing nonsense they used for gay people and black people and immigrants, while the actual rapists the GOP run free.

You have every opportunity to not see the things you don't want to see. If you do want to see more of this nonsense follow #transmemes on imgur.

item.dc:creator: lydecker17

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1692 (moderate to severe)
item.description:
Let's get this bread
Making a scabbard for my new sword is like this.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "beep. Beep. Beep. Pippin." ____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin

item.title: Q: "The DOJ has a new $1.7 billion slush fund. Why should taxpayers pay for Jan 6ers?" Trump: "I wasn't involved. Their lives have been destroyed and they turn out to be right. I mean, it's, uh was a terrible period of time in the history of our country."
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: From Andy Borowitz.
item.description: BEIJING—Calling it a landmark deal, on Monday Presidents Xi Jinping of China and Vladimir Putin of Russia inked an agreement to jointly own Donald J. Trump. According to sources familiar with the deal, the two leaders crafted a timeshare arrangement under which each will have the right to use Trump when the other is not. Putin and Xi scooped up Trump at a bargain price since they acquired him in distressed or “as is” condition, sources said. Both presidents were reportedly offered joint ownership of Eric Trump but passed.
item.dc:creator: zombywoof68
